description: You are a labor economist preparing a wage determination model using Current Population Survey (CPS) data. Before submitting your analysis for peer review, you need to check for multicollinearity among the regressors. Using the dataset at /home/ga/Documents/gretl_data/cps_wages.gdt, perform an OLS regression of the natural log of wage (lwage) on a constant, education (educ), experience (exper), experience squared (exper2), and the demographic/regional indicators (female, black, metro, south, west). Compute the Variance Inflation Factors (VIF) for this model. Save the Gretl script used for this analysis to /home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/vif_analysis.inp, the regression output to /home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/wage_model.txt, and the VIF results to /home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/vif_results.txt.
